name: hospital-careflow-demo
description: Patient-centric hospital scenario with compliance, auditability, versioned references, and multi-domain care flows.

steps.name: patients schema
statements: CREATE TABLE patients.patients (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, medical_record_no TEXT UNIQUE, full_name TEXT NOT NULL, dob TEXT, sex TEXT, national_id TEXT, consent_status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING', risk_level TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ROUTINE')
CREATE TABLE patients.patient_contacts (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, patient_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES patients(id), contact_name TEXT NOT NULL, relation TEXT NOT NULL, phone TEXT NOT NULL)
CREATE ENTITY patient_entity (ROOT patients, INCLUDES patient_contacts)

steps.name: careflow schema
statements: CREATE TABLE careflow.episodes (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, patient_id TEXT NOT NULL, patient_version INT, pathway_code TEXT NOT NULL, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'OPEN', origin TEXT NOT NULL, attending_clinician TEXT NOT NULL, VERSIONED FOREIGN KEY (patient_id) REFERENCES patients.patients(id) AS OF patient_version)

CREATE TABLE careflow.encounters (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, episode_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES episodes(id), patient_id TEXT NOT NULL, patient_version INT, encounter_type TEXT NOT NULL, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'IN_PROGRESS', started_at TEXT NOT NULL, clinician_id TEXT NOT NULL, VERSIONED FOREIGN KEY (patient_id) REFERENCES patients.patients(id) AS OF patient_version)
CREATE ENTITY episode_entity (ROOT episodes, INCLUDES encounters)

steps.name: clinical schema
statements: CREATE TABLE clinical.triage_assessments (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, episode_id TEXT NOT NULL, patient_id TEXT NOT NULL, patient_version INT, acuity TEXT NOT NULL, complaint TEXT NOT NULL, assessed_by TEXT NOT NULL, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'DONE', VERSIONED FOREIGN KEY (patient_id) REFERENCES patients.patients(id) AS OF patient_version)

CREATE TABLE clinical.diagnoses (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, episode_id TEXT NOT NULL, patient_id TEXT NOT NULL, patient_version INT, code TEXT NOT NULL, description TEXT NOT NULL, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ACTIVE', VERSIONED FOREIGN KEY (patient_id) REFERENCES patients.patients(id) AS OF patient_version)

steps.name: orders schema
statements: CREATE TABLE orders.lab_orders (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, episode_id TEXT NOT NULL, patient_id TEXT NOT NULL, patient_version INT, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'REQUESTED', test_code TEXT NOT NULL, ordered_by TEXT NOT NULL, clinical_reason TEXT NOT NULL, ordered_at TEXT NOT NULL, VERSIONED FOREIGN KEY (patient_id) REFERENCES patients.patients(id) AS OF patient_version)

CREATE TABLE orders.medication_orders (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, episode_id TEXT NOT NULL, patient_id TEXT NOT NULL, patient_version INT, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ORDERED', medication_code TEXT NOT NULL, dose TEXT NOT NULL, frequency TEXT NOT NULL, ordered_by TEXT NOT NULL, ordered_at TEXT NOT NULL, VERSIONED FOREIGN KEY (patient_id) REFERENCES patients.patients(id) AS OF patient_version)

steps.name: pharmacy schema
statements: CREATE TABLE pharmacy.dispensations (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, medication_order_id TEXT NOT NULL, episode_id TEXT NOT NULL, patient_id TEXT NOT NULL, patient_version INT, dispensed_by TEXT NOT NULL, quantity TEXT NOT NULL, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'DISPENSED', VERSIONED FOREIGN KEY (patient_id) REFERENCES patients.patients(id) AS OF patient_version)

steps.name: operations schema
statements: CREATE TABLE operations.bed_allocations (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, episode_id TEXT NOT NULL, patient_id TEXT NOT NULL, patient_version INT, ward TEXT NOT NULL, bed_code TEXT NOT NULL, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ASSIGNED', assigned_by TEXT NOT NULL, VERSIONED FOREIGN KEY (patient_id) REFERENCES patients.patients(id) AS OF patient_version)

CREATE TABLE operations.surgery_bookings (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, episode_id TEXT NOT NULL, patient_id TEXT NOT NULL, patient_version INT, procedure_code TEXT NOT NULL, room_code TEXT NOT NULL, scheduled_at TEXT NOT NULL, surgeon_id TEXT NOT NULL, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PLANNED', VERSIONED FOREIGN KEY (patient_id) REFERENCES patients.patients(id) AS OF patient_version)

steps.name: billing schema
statements: CREATE TABLE billing.charges (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, episode_id TEXT NOT NULL, patient_id TEXT NOT NULL, patient_version INT, charge_type TEXT NOT NULL, description TEXT NOT NULL, amount_cents INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING', VERSIONED FOREIGN KEY (patient_id) REFERENCES patients.patients(id) AS OF patient_version)

steps.name: compliance schema
statements: CREATE TABLE compliance.signatures (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, patient_id TEXT NOT NULL, patient_version INT, episode_id TEXT, artifact_type TEXT NOT NULL, artifact_id TEXT NOT NULL, signer_id TEXT NOT NULL, meaning TEXT NOT NULL, reason TEXT NOT NULL, signed_at TEXT NOT NULL, VERSIONED FOREIGN KEY (patient_id) REFERENCES patients.patients(id) AS OF patient_version)

CREATE TABLE compliance.audit_events (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, patient_id TEXT NOT NULL, patient_version INT, episode_id TEXT, event_type TEXT NOT NULL, actor_id TEXT NOT NULL, reason TEXT NOT NULL, artifact_type TEXT NOT NULL, artifact_id TEXT NOT NULL, occurred_at TEXT NOT NULL, payload_json TEXT NOT NULL, VERSIONED FOREIGN KEY (patient_id) REFERENCES patients.patients(id) AS OF patient_version)

steps.name: register patient
statements: INSERT INTO patients.patients (id, medical_record_no, full_name, dob, sex, national_id, consent_status, risk_level) VALUES ('patient-ana-lopez-001', 'MRN-2026-0001', 'Ana Lopez Garcia', '1988-04-11', 'F', 'ID-ES-ANA-0001', 'SIGNED', 'ROUTINE')
INSERT INTO patients.patient_contacts (id, patient_id, contact_name, relation, phone) VALUES ('contact-patient-ana-lopez-001', 'patient-ana-lopez-001', 'Carlos Lopez', 'BROTHER', '+34-600-100-100')

INSERT INTO compliance.signatures (id, patient_id, artifact_type, artifact_id, signer_id, meaning, reason, signed_at) VALUES ('sig-register-patient-ana-lopez-001', 'patient-ana-lopez-001', 'patient_registration', 'patient-ana-lopez-001', 'adm-001', 'ATTEST_PATIENT_IDENTITY', 'Initial patient registration', '2026-03-01T08:00:00Z')

steps.name: admit patient
statements: UPDATE patients.patients SET risk_level = 'HIGH' WHERE id = 'patient-ana-lopez-001'
INSERT INTO careflow.episodes (id, patient_id, pathway_code, status, origin, attending_clinician) VALUES ('episode-ana-001', 'patient-ana-lopez-001', 'EMERGENCY', 'OPEN', 'ED', 'clin-100')

steps.name: surgery booking
statements: INSERT INTO operations.surgery_bookings (id, episode_id, patient_id, procedure_code, room_code, scheduled_at, surgeon_id, status) VALUES ('surg-ana-001', 'episode-ana-001', 'patient-ana-lopez-001', 'ANGIOGRAM', 'OR-3', '2026-03-02T10:00:00Z', 'surgeon-501', 'PLANNED')

steps.name: discharge patient
statements: UPDATE patients.patients SET risk_level = 'FOLLOW_UP' WHERE id = 'patient-ana-lopez-001'
UPDATE careflow.episodes SET status = 'CLOSED' WHERE id = 'episode-ana-001'
UPDATE careflow.encounters SET status = 'CLOSED' WHERE episode_id = 'episode-ana-001'

INSERT INTO billing.charges (id, episode_id, patient_id, charge_type, description, amount_cents, status) VALUES ('charge-ana-001', 'episode-ana-001', 'patient-ana-lopez-001', 'EPISODE_CLOSE', 'Emergency + cardiology pathway closeout', 245000, 'POSTED')

INSERT INTO compliance.signatures (id, patient_id, episode_id, artifact_type, artifact_id, signer_id, meaning, reason, signed_at) VALUES ('sig-discharge-episode-ana-001', 'patient-ana-lopez-001', 'episode-ana-001', 'discharge', 'episode-ana-001', 'clin-100', 'ATTEST_DISCHARGE', 'Patient stabilized and discharged with follow-up', '2026-03-05T16:00:00Z')

INSERT INTO compliance.audit_events (id, patient_id, episode_id, event_type, actor_id, reason, artifact_type, artifact_id, occurred_at, payload_json) VALUES ('audit-discharge-episode-ana-001', 'patient-ana-lopez-001', 'episode-ana-001', 'PATIENT_DISCHARGED', 'clin-100', 'Patient stabilized and discharged with follow-up', 'episode', 'episode-ana-001', '2026-03-05T16:00:00Z', '{"stage":"discharge"}')
